examples: A delicious languor was stealing over him.
How easy it is for even an energetic person to lapse into a pleasant languor.
Moderation is the languor and sloth of the soul, Ambition its activity and heat.
On Leaf Cay, for example, yard-long rock iguanas sun themselves with a languor unbecoming an endangered species.
Nothing so much proved the point as the perceived femininity of the East, that beguiling, voluptuous realm of languor and luxury.
